description: Sink into softness with these cool black slide-ins from reebok. Designed for comfort, these sandals are great for indoors and can be work outdoors as well as for dry days.Upper Wide velvet straps with tape detailing and brand name on the crossed strap design Midsole Foam footbed for all day comfort with velvet covering Outsole TPR outsole with ridged swirl pattern for good grip shoe careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with damp clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight
